[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100001111 5
1 100100001 3
2 010010010 3
3 101111111 8
4 101111101 7
5 111111011 8
6 111101110 7
7 111010100 5

01 10 001000000 1
12 21 111001110 6
23 32 011011111 7
34 43 011110000 4
45 54 011011110 6
56 65 101101101 6
67 76 010110101 5
70 07 010100111 5

02 20 110001110 5
13 31 100010001 3
24 42 000101111 5
35 53 000101110 4
46 64 110110011 6
57 75 111011000 5
60 06 000010010 2
71 17 011100111 6

14 41 111100001 5
25 52 011110001 5
36 63 101000011 4
47 74 100000110 3
50 05 101111111 8 match 3
61 16 001010010 3
72 27 100101001 4

15 51 100111111 7

37 73 111110110 7
